10x Your AI Workflow: Mercury 2 + GPT 5.4 Integration Guide

Learn how to combine Mercury 2's lightning-fast execution with GPT 5.4's advanced reasoning to build autonomous AI systems. This video breaks down the AI worker architecture and provides five practical workflows to automate your content and marketing instantly.

02:23 - The AI Worker Architecture
03:26 - Workflow: Automated Content Engines
04:31 - Workflow: Rapid Marketing Campaigns
06:08 - Multi-Model Automation Pipelines
07:23 - Building Your AI Systems
